goal: Make unhinted repo-local advisory use the active workspace chip instead of returning an empty result when lexical selection finds no matches.
constraints: Validate with both unit tests and a real unhinted advise run
behavioral_changes: Unhinted repo-local advisory now falls back to the active workspace chip when relevance selection returns nothing.
The packaging-oriented unhinted advise path now returns domain-chip-labs guidance instead of an empty advisory response.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_chip_advisor.py tests/test_chip_mcp_server.py tests/test_hooks.py -q
PYTHONPATH=src python -m chip_labs.cli advise "stabilize packaging and preserve hook compatibility" --output research/meta/advise_output_phase8_unhinted_2026-03-21.json
follow_up: Decide whether the same workspace fallback should influence any other advisory entrypoints.
Keep distinguishing repo-local fallback behavior from general multi-chip ranking behavior.
